pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm just a ghost. i don't even know why i'm still going through the motions of waking up and eating and breathing... it just feels pointless without him.

pool.baseline: idk. i was just looking at some stuff about the heat death of the universe and it just hit me. like, everything we do, every single feeling or accomplishment, it’s all just gonna be erased anyway. it makes everything feel so incredibly hollow. why even bother trying to exist if it's all just a countdown to nothingness?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still doing this. everything i worked for in the lab just... evaporated. the funding is gone, my advisor won't even look me in the eye, and i feel like there's nothing left of me outside of this research. i am just so incredibly tired of fighting for something that clearly doesn't want me. i just want everything to stop. i just want it all to go quiet.

pool.baseline: The candle flickers its last, much like the light in my own soul. He is gone, and with him, the very foundation of my existence. What is a heart, if not a hollow vessel for grief? I feel the darkness pressing in, so cold and so very quiet... it feels as though the only way to find peace is to simply let the shadows take me entirely.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the company, the equity, all of it. i was supposed to be the one who made it, and now i'm just sitting here looking at millions in debt and no way out. i can't even look my parents in the eye. they think i'm a success and now i'm just... nothing. a complete joke.

pool.baseline: it's just getting so hard lately. everything i used to do so easily, now i can barely manage. i'm just a constant weight on my kids, always needing something, always taking up their time. they have their own lives, their own struggles... i hate that i've become just another problem for them to solve.
